news.title: TSMC and ASML post-earnings stock moves could be a sign of what's to come from chip companies
news.summary: TSMC and ASML failed to catch major tailwinds from strong earnings. It could be a bellwether for the chip industry as a whole.

news.title: U.S. Navy stopped 13 ships from passing Iranian port blockade, Pentagon says
news.summary: The U.S. has signaled optimism about the prospect of reaching a diplomatic end to the Iran war. The U.N. Security Council is expected to meet this week to discuss the situation.

news.title: Anthropic rolls out Claude Opus 4.7, an AI model that is 'broadly less capable' than Mythos
news.summary: Claude Mythos Preview is Anthropic's most powerful AI model. It excels at identifying weaknesses and security flaws within software. It can be used to identify and fix security holes in software.

news.title: Charles Schwab to launch direct bitcoin, ethereum trading to compete with Robinhood
news.summary: Charles Schwab is rolling out crypto trading, allowing clients to buy bitcoin and ether. Schwab Crypto is a new arm of Charles Schwab.

news.title: Airline CEOs urged by lawmaker to lower fares if fuel prices come down
news.summary: Airlines have raised airfare, fuel surcharges and baggage fees this year to help cover a surge in fuel costs since the Iran war started.

news.title: People are actively managing their money more than ever, Charles Schwab says
news.summary: Charles Schwab's stock was leading the S&P 500’s decliners Thursday. Revenue rose to a quarterly record amid record trading activity, but missed expectations.

news.title: I’m selling my law practice and retiring. Do I pay off the $2 million mortgage on my office building — or rent it out?
news.summary: “My wife is not a fan of tying up $2 million of equity in one building,” he says. “I don’t want to be in a building that’s worth that much equity.”

news.title: A bullish indicator for software stocks just flashed. Why a true comeback could be in the cards.
news.summary: The software sector has closed above its 50-day moving average in a key technical breakout. After a five-month slide fueled by AI disruption fears, the software sector is back on track.

news.title: Planning to age in place? Watch out for these hidden costs.
news.summary: Most retirees want to stay in their homes as they age. It might not be worth it, experts say. The cost of staying in your home may be too high.

news.title: ‘I’m in my 30s and majored in finance’: In the age of AI, which pays off — a CFA or an executive MBA?
news.summary: “I want long-term job security and to not be in a crazy amount of debt,” she says. “I don’t want to be in debt for the rest of my life.”
